nodes.title: Load Image Note
widgets_values:
<<<< Load your image and apply mask

Add prompt (e.g. Change woman's shirt to blue)>>>>

Use ControlNet for changing poses.  Be sure to select OpenPose or DepthAnything

True = OpenPose
False = ControlNet

False = Uses your image size and resolution.

True = Uses the size you choose in the box below.
The girl from image1 is making the pose in image2 and wearing the outfit in image3.
Change the color of the woman's jacket to a plush tan.

nodes.title: Start here for workflow info:
widgets_values:
# MODELS USED IN THIS WORKFLOW  

---

# GGUF Models

## 🔍 Qwen-Image-Edit
### **Qwen-Image Edit-2509 model (GGUF)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2509-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

### **Qwen-Image Edit-2511 model (GGUF)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

**Pick one of the above.  Be sure to select a model size right for your GPU)

### **Qwen Text Encoder (GGUF)** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

❗  **You must also download an MMPROJ file and put it in the Text Encoder folder as well.** ❗ 

---

# FP8 Models

## 🔍 Qwen-Image-Edit
### **Qwen-Image Edit-2509 model (FP8)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

### **Qwen-Image Edit-2511 model (FP8)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

**Pick one of the above.  Be sure to select a model size right for your GPU)

### **Qwen Text Encoder (FP8)** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

---

### **Qwen Lightning  LoRA** 2511 from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/tree/main)
 

### **OR**

### **Qwen Lightning  LoRA** 2509 from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Lightning/tree/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2509)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras`
